tool_args.label: Fresh Pond Rd Transit & Traffic Improvements

payload.project_name: Fresh Pond Rd Transit & Traffic Improvements
payload.description: Fresh Pond Rd (Metropolitan Ave to Putnam Ave) identified as 2019 priority project under Better Buses Action Plan. Proposed curbside bus lane southbound Bleecker St to Putnam Ave, bus stop consolidation, parking changes, and loading zones.

tool_args.label: Fresh Pond Rd (Metropolitan Ave to Putnam Ave)

payload.description: Fresh Pond Rd from Metropolitan Ave to Putnam Ave (1/2 mi). Continuous southbound traffic backup in afternoon & evening.
Queens' Busiest Bus Route. Ridgewood, Maspeth, Elmhurst, Corona & Flushing.

tool_args.label: Proposed curbside bus lane, Bleecker St to Putnam Ave (southbound)

payload.location_text: Fresh Pond Rd southbound, Bleecker St to Putnam Ave
payload.description: Curbside bus lane, Bleecker St to Putnam Ave. Active during 2-8pm Mon-Fri; parking/loading other times. Allows buses to bypass traffic congestion. Provides dedicated SB vehicular lane for local residents to access commercial core & residential neighborhood. Improves traffic flow for all vehicles.

normalized_location.raw_text: Fresh Pond Rd southbound, Bleecker St to Putnam Ave

tool_args.label: Bus stop consolidation on Fresh Pond Rd

payload.description: Proposed bus stop consolidation: 4 stop pairs (reduced from 5), each ~3 blocks apart. 3 pairs retained, 1 pair moved for even spacing, 1 pair eliminated.

tool_args.label: Parking and loading changes on Fresh Pond Rd

payload.location_text: Fresh Pond Rd and adjacent spurs
payload.description: Bus lane would repurpose 70 spaces during PM peak (55 metered, 15 ASP). Mitigated by 61 new metered spaces on spurs. 2-hour metered parking Mon-Sat 9a-7p. ASP other times. New loading zones at key locations. Grove St: convert No Standing to designated loading zone.

normalized_location.raw_text: Fresh Pond Rd and adjacent spurs
